name: cowork-mdm
description: Claude Desktop enterprise MDM toolkit — profile authoring, org plugin marketplace, per-host diagnostics

plugins.name: cowork-mdm
plugins.description: Drive the cowork-mdm CLI from inside Claude Code: generate Claude Desktop MDM profiles (.mobileconfig / plist), install org plugins from git marketplaces, and diagnose broken hosts. Requires the cowork-mdm CLI on PATH (brew install krislavten/tap/cowork-mdm).
